pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces, causing runtime failures and incompatibility with modern libraries on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 17 settings on a Java 21 project may miss new language features or fail if the build environment enforces the target version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated mysql-connector-java with mysql-connector-j to comply with Maven Central naming conventions and Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact mysql-connector-java is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with Spring Boot 3's dependency management; the new artifact is required for proper resolution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.el with jakarta.validation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace migration in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces (jakarta.*); javax.* packages are removed, causing ClassNotFoundException at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove standalone swagger-annotations dependency as it is now managed by springdoc-openapi-starter.
pom.xml.why_exists: The standalone swagger-annotations artifact is incompatible with Spring Boot 3's Jakarta namespace; springdoc-openapi-starter provides the necessary annotations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace springdoc-openapi-ui with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to support Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE.
pom.xml.why_exists: springdoc-openapi-ui (v1.x) relies on javax.servlet and is incompatible with Spring Boot 3; the starter (v2.x) is required for Jakarta EE support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.mail-api dependency to support Jakarta EE mail services in tests.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.mail is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; jakarta.mail-api is required for mail-related functionality in Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+).

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate validation constraint import from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on Spring Boot 3 / Java 21.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate validation constraint import from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; code using javax.validation will fail to compile due to missing class.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+/Spring Boot 3, causing 'package javax.persistence does not exist' compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+/Spring Boot 3, causing 'package javax.validation does not exist' compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Replace deprecated JpaRepository.getById with getReferenceById to comply with Spring Data JPA 3.x API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: Compile error: method getById(Long) is not found in JpaRepository interface in Spring Data JPA 3.x (used by Spring Boot 3.3).

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or compilation error when running on Spring Boot 3 / Java 21.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate validation constraint import from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ namespace.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code using javax imports will fail to compile or find the class at runtime on Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: Compilation failure: the javax.servlet package is no longer available in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing 'package javax.servlet does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x / Java 21 ecosystem); using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate validation API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ dependencies.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate validation constraint imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code will fail to compile with 'package javax.validation.constraints does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate javax.validation.constraints.Email import to jakarta.validation.constraints.Email for Jakarta EE namespace compatibility.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE / Spring Boot 3 environments.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate javax.validation.constraints.NotBlank import to jakarta.validation.constraints.NotBlank for Jakarta EE namespace compatibility.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE / Spring Boot 3 environments.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Migrate javax.validation.constraints.Size import to jakarta.validation.constraints.Size for Jakarta EE namespace compatibility.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE / Spring Boot 3 environments.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Remove inheritance from the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter class.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors if the class is not found or if the method signature is incompatible with the new bean-based configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Replace the overridden configure(HttpSecurity) method with a SecurityFilterChain bean definition.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: Spring Security 6 no longer supports extending WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter; security configuration must be provided via a @Bean of type SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.before:
@Override
    protected void configure(final HttpSecurity httpSecurity) throws Exception {
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.after:
@Bean
    SecurityFilterChain filterChain(final HttpSecurity httpSecurity) throws Exception {

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Update requiresChannel configuration to use the new lambda DSL and requestMatchers.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The old antMatchers() method inside requiresChannel() is removed in Spring Security 6; it must be replaced with requestMatchers().

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Update httpBasic configuration to use the new lambda DSL.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The old httpBasic().disable() chain style is removed in Spring Security 6; it must be replaced with the lambda style httpBasic(basic -> basic.disable()).

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Update csrf configuration to use the new lambda DSL.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The old csrf().disable() chain style is removed in Spring Security 6; it must be replaced with the lambda style csrf(csrf -> csrf.disable()).

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Update sessionManagement configuration to use the new lambda DSL.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The old sessionManagement().sessionCreationPolicy(...) chain style is removed in Spring Security 6; it must be replaced with the lambda style.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Replace authorizeRequests with authorizeHttpRequests and update matcher methods.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: authorizeRequests() and antMatchers() are removed in Spring Security 6; they must be replaced with authorizeHttpRequests() and requestMatchers().

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Update exceptionHandling configuration to use the new lambda DSL.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The old exceptionHandling().authenticationEntryPoint(...) chain style is removed in Spring Security 6; it must be replaced with the lambda style.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Add return statement to build and return the SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The new SecurityFilterChain bean method must return a SecurityFilterChain object; the old void configure method did not require this.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Add import for SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The new method signature returns SecurityFilterChain, which must be imported.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Add import for Bean annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The new configuration method is annotated with @Bean, which must be imported.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Remove import for deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: The class no longer extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter, so the import is unused and should be removed to avoid compilation warnings/errors.

src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available on the classpath in Spring Boot 3 applications, causing compilation errors.
